title: vandenboschia colensoi
intro: Vandenboschia colensoi, also known as the New Zealand forked spleenwort, is a type of epiphytic fern native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Vandenboschia colensoi include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Vandenboschia colensoi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
